revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23417362209|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Globalize here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Globalize for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B=
<!-- {{Globalize}} begin -->{{ambox
| name  = Globalize
| subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly>
| type  = content
| class = ambox-globalize
| image = [[File:ambox globe content.svg|50x40px|alt=Globe icon.|link=]]
| issue = The examples and perspective in this {{{1|article}}} '''{{#if:{{{2|}}}{{{3|}}}{{{4|}}}|deal primarily with {{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{{2name|{{Globalize/name|{{Globalize/name|{{{2}}}}}|displayname}}}}}, {{{3name|{{Globalize/name|{{Globalize/name|{{{3}}}}}|displayname}}}}}, and {{{4name|{{Globalize/name|{{Globalize/name|{{{4}}}}}|displayname}}}}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{2name|{{Globalize/name|{{Globalize/name|{{{2}}}}}|displayname}}}}} and {{{3name|{{Globalize/name|{{Globalize/name|{{{3}}}}}|displayname}}}}}|{{{2name|{{Globalize/name|{{Globalize/name|{{{2}}}}}|displayname}}}}}}}}} and do|may}} not represent a [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Countering systemic bias|worldwide view]] of the subject'''. {{#if:{{{reason|}}}|The specific issue is: '''{{{reason}}}'''}}
| fix   = You may [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} improve this {{{1|article}}}], discuss the issue on the {{#if:{{{discussion|}}}{{{discuss|}}}{{{talk|}}}
 |[[{{{discussion|}}}{{{discuss|}}}{{{talk|}}}|talk page]], or {{#ifeq:{{{1|article}}}|article|[[Wikipedia:Article wizard|create a new article]]|create a new {{{1}}}}}, as appropriate
 |[[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]], or {{#ifeq:{{{1|article}}}|article|[[Wikipedia:Article wizard|create a new article]]|create a new {{{1}}}}}, as appropriate
}}.
| removalnotice = yes
| date  = {{{date|}}}
| small = {{{small|}}}
| cat   = Articles with limited geographic scope
| all   = {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:{{Globalize/name|{{{2}}}}}-centric|{{Globalize/name|{{{2}}}}}-centric|Pages in non-existent country centric categories}}}}
| all2  = {{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:{{Globalize/name|{{{3}}}}}-centric|{{Globalize/name|{{{3}}}}}-centric|Pages in non-existent country centric categories}}}}
| all3  = {{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:{{Globalize/name|{{{4}}}}}-centric|{{Globalize/name|{{{4}}}}}-centric|Pages in non-existent country centric categories}}}}
}}<!-- {{Globalize}} end -->
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage; inter-wikis go to Wikidata, thank you! -->

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Globalize for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B=
{{ambox
| name  = Globalize
| subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly>
| type  = content
| class = ambox-globalize
| image = [[File:ambox globe content.svg|50x40px|alt=Globe icon.|link=]]
| issue = The examples and perspective in this {{{1|article}}} '''{{#if:{{{2|}}}{{{3|}}}{{{4|}}}|deal primarily with {{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{{2name|{{Globalize/name|{{Globalize/name|{{{2}}}}}|displayname}}}}}, {{{3name|{{Globalize/name|{{Globalize/name|{{{3}}}}}|displayname}}}}}, and {{{4name|{{Globalize/name|{{Globalize/name|{{{4}}}}}|displayname}}}}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{{2name|{{Globalize/name|{{Globalize/name|{{{2}}}}}|displayname}}}}} and {{{3name|{{Globalize/name|{{Globalize/name|{{{3}}}}}|displayname}}}}}|{{{2name|{{Globalize/name|{{Globalize/name|{{{2}}}}}|displayname}}}}}}}}} and do|may}} not represent a [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Countering systemic bias|worldwide view]] of the subject'''. {{#if:{{{reason|}}}|The specific issue is: '''{{{reason}}}'''}}
| fix   = You may [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} improve this {{{1|article}}}], discuss the issue on the {{#if:{{{discussion|}}}{{{discuss|}}}{{{talk|}}}
 |[[{{{discussion|}}}{{{discuss|}}}{{{talk|}}}|talk page]], or {{#ifeq:{{{1|article}}}|article|[[Wikipedia:Article wizard|create a new article]]|create a new {{{1}}}}}, as appropriate
 |[[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]], or {{#ifeq:{{{1|article}}}|article|[[Wikipedia:Article wizard|create a new article]]|create a new {{{1}}}}}, as appropriate
}}.
| removalnotice = yes
| date  = {{{date|}}}
| small = {{{small|}}}
| cat   = Articles with limited geographic scope
| all   = {{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:{{Globalize/name|{{{2}}}}}-centric|{{Globalize/name|{{{2}}}}}-centric|Pages in non-existent country centric categories}}}}
| all2  = {{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:{{Globalize/name|{{{3}}}}}-centric|{{Globalize/name|{{{3}}}}}-centric|Pages in non-existent country centric categories}}}}
| all3  = {{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{#ifexist:Category:{{Globalize/name|{{{4}}}}}-centric|{{Globalize/name|{{{4}}}}}-centric|Pages in non-existent country centric categories}}}}
}}
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
